_note: Clip-level labels for building a hand-hygiene action classifier dataset. label = the action shown. The pipeline crops the HANDS region (via pose wrists) so the model learns the ACTION, not the room background. THIS IS A SEED for the pipeline -- a real model needs many clips/people/sites (e.g. Kaggle 'Hand Wash Dataset', or labeled ward footage). For interval-level labels add an 'intervals' field per clip.
